title: Manufacturing Engineer - ABB India - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - ABB India - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Manufacturing Engineer looking for your next big career move? ABB India in Surat offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About ABB India:
ABB India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India!
